meta.title: Watch SpaceX's first booster landing in California & beautiful twilight phenomenon!
meta.description:
SpaceX is being paid by CONAE, the Argentine space agency, to send the SAOCOM 1A satellite into a low Earth sun synchronous orbit. SpaceX will be launching the satellite on top of one of their Falcon 9 rockets.

Two things are extra exciting about this launch: For the first time on the west coast, SpaceX will be attempting a Return to Launch Site (RTLS) landing for the Falcon 9 booster at Space Launch Complex 4 west (SLC-4W or LZ-4). 

Want more info? Here you go! https://everydayastronaut.com/prelaunch-preview-spacex-saocom-1a/

Check out my new podcast!!!! - https://ourludicrousfuture.com

Show your support and join our discord channel by becoming a Patron - http://patreon.com/everydayastronaut
